nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gymnoris
nodes.summary: Gymnoris（Gymnoris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Yellow-throated bush sparrow、Sahel bush sparrow、Yellow-spotted bush sparrow等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated bush sparrow
nodes.summary: The yellow-throated bush sparrow (Gymnoris superciliaris), also known as the yellow-throated petronia, is a species of bird in the sparrow family Passeridae. It is found in south-central and southern Africa in its natural habitats of subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References External links Media related to Gymnoris superciliaris at Wikimedia Commons Yellow-throated petronia in The Atlas of Southern African Birds
